name: Hesed
title: Hesed
description: Dark-themed multi-page church/religious organization website. Preloader with dots-jump animation. Header with logo and multi-page navigation (Home, About, Events, Contact). Hero section with full-screen parallax background image, decorative left bar, large mission statement heading ('We Exist To Honor God And Make Disciples'), two CTA buttons (Upcoming Events, About Us), vertical social links (Facebook, YouTube, Instagram), and scroll indicator. About section: left column with welcome subhead, lead text, and CTA button; right column with 3 service schedule items (Main Church Service, Kids Church, Prayer Meeting) showing times and locations. Connect section: two equal columns with 'Volunteer With Us' and 'Join a Connect Group' cards, each with description and full-width CTA button. Events section: 4 upcoming events in a 2-column grid with titles, descriptions, and meta info (date, time, location). Series section: split layout with background image left and content right showing current sermon series, Watch/Listen buttons, and podcast subscribe links (Apple Podcast, Spotify, SoundCloud, YouTube). Social section: 4 large social media links with icons. Footer: logo, description, location with Get Direction button, quick links list, copyright, and back-to-top.

typography.style: Warm serif body with strong sans-serif headings, church/community feel

layoutDetails: Max-width row container, flexbox grid with large-half columns, split-screen series section, responsive with block-900-full stacking
visualStyle: Warm dark church website with teal accents, parallax hero, event listings, and sermon series showcase

name: Host Cloud
title: Host Cloud - Free HTML5 Bootstrap Template
description: Web hosting/SaaS multi-page template with a clean white design and cyan/purple accent colors. Preloader with purple-to-blue gradient background. Header has logo text (Host Cloud), Bootstrap navbar with 4 links, and Log in/Sign Up buttons. Hero banner section with domain search input field, extension checkboxes (.com, .net, .org, .in) with prices, and a cyan Search Now button. Trusted customers section with Owl Carousel logo slider. Services section with 3 service cards featuring database icons. Pricing section with 3 pricing plan cards (Basic $15.50, VPS $30, Advanced $72.25) each with feature checklists and CTA buttons.

typography.style: Clean Roboto with strong heading weights, professional SaaS typography

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container with offset columns for centered content. Multi-page structure. Owl Carousel for trusted logos. 3-column pricing grid.
visualStyle: Clean professional hosting template with cyan accents, purple-to-blue gradient highlights, organized pricing cards, and domain search functionality.

name: Pipeline
title: Pipeline Bootstrap 4.0 Theme
description: Sidebar navigation template with a fixed left sidebar menu and scrollable main content area. Banner section shows a large title. Welcome area features a full-width image with two text boxes below. Gallery section displays a 3x2 grid of images with hover overlay effects and Magnific Popup lightbox. Services section uses a two-column layout with a tall vertical image and descriptive text. About section has bordered text boxes with a purple accent panel. Contact section splits into a left form area and right address panel with social icons.
layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with icon-based navigation links. Scrollable main content area on the right. Sidebar collapses on mobile. Content sections stack vertically with alternating backgrounds.
visualStyle: Clean corporate with purple/magenta accent. Sidebar navigation with icon labels. Image hover overlays with border animations. Two-tone contact section. Flat design with bordered boxes.

name: Seo Dream
title: SEO Dream - Creative SEO HTML5 Template by TemplateMo
description: SaaS/SEO agency single-page template with a gradient-accented hero section featuring animated elements and a prominent call-to-action button. Fixed top navigation with smooth scroll. Sections include Features/Services with icon cards showing SEO-related offerings, About section with statistics counters (animated count-up numbers), Work Process section with step-by-step workflow icons, Portfolio section with project thumbnails, Pricing section with three-tier plan cards, Blog section with post cards, and Contact section with a form. Owl Carousel for testimonials. ScrollReveal animations on section entry. Modern gradient color scheme with purple-to-pink tones. Bootstrap 4 responsive grid.

typography.style: Raleway with wide weight range (100-900), elegant and modern

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar. Hero with gradient background and animated elements. Features in icon card grid. Statistics with counter animation. Pricing in 3-column cards. Blog in card grid.
visualStyle: Modern SaaS with purple-to-pink gradient accents, clean white backgrounds, animated counters, scroll-reveal effects, and card-based content blocks.

name: Bitbank
title: Bit-Bank
description: Cryptocurrency exchange and trading platform website with light theme. Top ticker bar showing live crypto prices (BTC/USD, ETH/USD, BCH/USD, BTG/USD, DASH/USD, XRP/USD, ZEC/USD) with up/down status indicators. Fixed navigation with logo, multi-page links (Home, Buy/Sell, FAQ, Contact, Sign In, Sign Up, Pages dropdown). Hero section with split layout: left side video player with play button overlay, right side heading and CTA button. Counter stats row ($50B+ Bitcoin Served, 10M+ Server Build, 68 Countries, 10B Active Trades). About section with gray background, two-column layout with Bitcoin graph placeholder. Services section with 6 icon cards in 3-column grid. How It Works section with 3 numbered steps. CTA banner. Pricing section with Buy/Sell tab pills, 3 pricing cards each with progress bar, plus custom amount form. Testimonial carousel. Blog section with 2-column article cards. 4-column footer.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif body with elegant serif headings, fintech feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container grid, 12-column system, full-width sections alternating white and gray backgrounds
visualStyle: Clean cryptocurrency exchange platform with teal-green accents, pricing cards, live ticker, and financial data presentation

name: Blue Pro
title: Blue Pro
description: Professional business landing page with light theme and cyan-blue accent. Full-screen hero slider with large heading and CTA buttons. Features section with icon boxes. Prototype showcase with device mockups. Services section with icon cards. Video background section with play button. Portfolio gallery with filterable grid and lightbox. Parallax divider sections. Pricing table with 3 plan columns. Testimonial section. Contact form with validation. Google Maps integration. Single-page smooth-scroll navigation (Home, Service, Portfolio, Testimonial, Price, Contact). Footer with social links.

typography.style: Clean professional sans-serif throughout, corporate feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid with container, full-width parallax sections, portfolio grid with filtering, responsive stacking at 979px and 767px
visualStyle: Professional corporate landing page with cyan-blue accents, parallax backgrounds, video section, and portfolio showcase

name: Cloud Sync
title: CloudSync - Seamless Cloud Storage for Teams
description: Cloud storage SaaS landing page with a dark (#0f172a) tech-forward design. Hero section with animated gradient backgrounds and a bold headline about cloud storage for teams. Features section with a mixed layout: large feature cards with icons and checklists, plus smaller feature tiles. Interactive pricing section with team size and storage sliders that dynamically update prices for Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers. About section with company stats and mission. Contact form with name, email, company, subject, and message fields. Mobile hamburger navigation. Modern system font stack.

typography.style: System font stack for fast loading. Bold headings on dark backgrounds. Clean and modern tech aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Single-page with smooth scroll navigation. Hero with animated gradient backgrounds. Features use mixed card sizes (large + small). Pricing with interactive range sliders. About section with stat counters. Contact form at bottom.
visualStyle: Dark tech-forward SaaS aesthetic with indigo (#6366f1) primary and emerald/pink accents. Animated gradient hero backgrounds. Interactive pricing sliders. Card-based feature layout. Modern, premium startup feel.
